script:
A few years ago I ordered a late night rideshare after hanging out with some friends.
It was around midnight and the streets were mostly empty.
I got the notification that my driver had arrived, so I walked outside.
A car was waiting at the curb with the same model and color as the one in the app.
I opened the back door and got in.
The driver didn’t say anything, just started driving.
After a minute I tried making small talk and asked how his night was going.
He didn’t respond.
